brandInfo.name: LUSH MAKEOVERS
brandInfo.subtitle: Vijayawada's most-booked bridal studio
brandInfo.description: Serving brides across Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh & destination weddings

homeHero.headline: TIMELESS BRIDES
homeHero.subheadline: Luxury bridal makeup for the bride who wants to look like herself — at her most beautiful.
homeHero.philosophy: At Lush Makeovers, we believe your wedding day face should still be your face. Our signature is skin that looks like skin — flawless, luminous, and photograph-ready without ever feeling heavy. With over 10 years of artistry, 3,000+ brides, and training from the London College of Makeup, every look we create is built around one idea: enhance, never mask. You will look back at your photos in 20 years and love what you see.
differentiators: A calm, on-time bridal morning — we run your getting-ready hours to a plan, so you're never rushed to the mandap.
The natural signature — our skin-first technique gives an airbrushed finish that still looks like you in person and on camera.
London-certified artistry — led by a London College of Makeup certified artist with 10+ years of bridal experience.
Complete personal attention — your look is planned in advance, your trial is documented, and your bridal team is dedicated to you alone on the day.

founderAccordions.title: Welcoming Line
founderAccordions.content: Thank you for being here — if you're planning your bridal look, you're in the right hands.

founderAccordions.title: My Signature Style
founderAccordions.content: Soft, luminous, natural bridal makeup. I build the look from skincare up, so the finish is fresh and long-wearing through pheras, tears, and 12-hour wedding days. My brides look like the best version of themselves — never like someone else.

founderAccordions.title: Services
founderAccordions.content: Signature bridal makeup, engagement & reception looks, muhurtham and multi-event wedding packages, bridal trials, party & guest makeup, saree draping and bridal hairstyling — plus professional makeup education through Lush Makeovers Academy.

founderAccordions.title: How I Plan Your Bridal Morning
founderAccordions.content: Every booking starts with a look consultation and a minute-by-minute timeline for your wedding morning — hair, draping, makeup, and jewellery setting are sequenced so you're photo-ready before your photographer even asks. Outstation weddings include full travel and stay coordination.

founderAccordions.title: Why Brides Trust Me
founderAccordions.content: London College of Makeup certified. 10+ years in bridal artistry. 3,000+ brides across Andhra Pradesh and Telangana. 200+ professional artists trained through our academy. A 123K-strong Instagram community that watches our work daily.

curatedPoints.rest: - we run your getting-ready hours to a plan, so you're never rushed to the mandap.
- our skin-first technique gives an airbrushed finish that still looks like you in person and on camera.
- led by a London College of Makeup certified artist with 10+ years of bridal experience.
- your look is planned in advance, your trial is documented, and your bridal team is dedicated to you alone on the day.

testimonials.quote: When researching bridal makeup artists in Vijayawada, I felt so reassured the moment I met the team at Lush Makeovers. They understood my vision and made me feel like the most radiant version of myself. The most calming experience.
testimonials.author: Sneha, Vijayawada Bride

testimonials.quote: Absolutely flawless work. My HD bridal look lasted through a 14-hour wedding day, three outfit changes and an outdoor reception and still looked picture-perfect at midnight.
testimonials.author: Divya, Hyderabad

testimonials.quote: Beyond gifted artists. They made my mother, my sister and me all look like the most beautiful versions of ourselves. Lush Makeovers is truly Vijayawada's gold standard.
testimonials.author: Anusha, Guntur

aboutFounder.name: Sri
aboutFounder.role: Founder & Lead Bridal Artist, Lush Makeovers
aboutFounder.greeting: Hi, I'm Sri - bridal artist, educator, and the face behind Lush Makeovers.
aboutFounder.intro: Bridal beauty, for me, began as passion and became a calling grounded in calm, precision, and care.

aboutStory.title: How it started
aboutStory.body: Makeup began as a passion long before it became a profession. What started with doing looks for friends and family in Vijayawada grew into a calling: helping brides feel completely, confidently themselves on the biggest day of their lives. Add 1-2 personal lines here about your first bride and the moment you knew this was your path.

aboutStory.title: Training
aboutStory.body: To build world-class technique, Sri trained and certified at the London College of Makeup, bringing international standards in skin prep, HD and airbrush artistry back to Andhra Pradesh. Continuous learning remains part of the studio's DNA; techniques are updated every season.

aboutStory.title: The studio
aboutStory.body: Lush Makeovers opened its doors in Vijayawada in 2016, growing from a one-artist practice into a full bridal studio with a trained in-house team. Today the studio serves brides across AP and Telangana and travels for destination weddings across India.

aboutStory.title: The academy
aboutStory.body: With demand growing, Sri began teaching, and Lush Makeovers Academy was born. Over 200 professional artists have now been trained through hands-on masterclasses, many of whom run successful bridal businesses of their own. Teaching keeps the craft sharp and the standards high.

aboutMilestones.label: Lush Makeovers studio opens in Vijayawada
Lush Makeovers Academy launches; first professional batch
3,000+ brides served - 200+ artists trained - 123K Instagram community

aboutPullQuote: A bride should look like herself on her wedding day - only unforgettable.

contactInfo.title: Contact
contactInfo.subtitle: we would love to hear from you
contactInfo.greeting: Whether you are planning a wedding, exploring the academy, or simply have a quiet question — please reach out. We respond personally to every message within 24 hours.

faqs.q: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.a: For wedding dates, we recommend booking 4 to 8 months in advance. Trial appointments can usually be scheduled within 2 to 3 weeks.

faqs.q: Do you travel for destination weddings?
faqs.a: Yes, we travel across India and to international destinations. Travel and accommodation are billed separately and discussed transparently during enquiry.

faqs.q: Can the studio accommodate the bride's family?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Our studio can comfortably host the bride and up to six family members or bridesmaids for a single morning.
Academy visits are strictly by appointment. Please write to us with your preferred date and we will block a private studio walkthrough.

inquireConfig.title: Inquire
inquireConfig.subtitle: a private invitation to plan your day
inquireConfig.intro: Share a few details about your celebration. Our admissions team will respond within 24 hours with availability, a tailored quote and an invitation to a private studio visit.
promises: A tailored quote - no template pricing
A private studio visit, no obligation
Your details treated with absolute discretion
